_comment: Default-value reference for run_arch_spectral_depth_irrelevance2.py — §9.1 v2 tied-weight α-sweep with sqrt_D (long-context / population-style) label normalization and a transfer-alignment figure. Mirrors the ArchSpectralDepthIrrelevance2Config dataclass defaults. The script does NOT auto-load this JSON; to override defaults pass CLI flags. Supersedes v1 (run_arch_spectral_depth_irrelevance.py) which used sqrt_P. Architecture-aligned support for theorem-B depth irrelevance; NOT an exact theorem proof. Does not modify the canonical decoupled §9.1 script (run_arch_spectral_linear_stationary.py).
plan_reference: EXPERIMENT_PLAN_FINAL.MD §9.1 (architecture-aligned spectral-only suite, tied-weight α-sweep, v2)
